Jurinea decipiens is a plant used in traditional medicine, and it is reported to have several health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which may help to protect against various diseases and promote overall well-being.

The bioactive constituents of Jurinea decipiens include flavonoids, terpenoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. These compounds may help to explain the plant's ability to protect against oxidative stress, inflammation, and microbial infections.
